free_text: A  cloud  chamber  in  a  magnetic  field.  The

of nitrogen and helium with partial pressures of 390
The photonuclear  reaction  yields and integral cross
sections of the (g,p), (g,n) and (g,np) reactions as
well as the total cross section are determined.  The
technique of identification made possible a reliable
reactions,  except for  those  cases  in  which  the
neutron  and  proton  energy  ratio  was < 0.1.  The
energy and  angular  distributions  of  protons  and
reactions   are   discussed   and   compared    with
calculations based on the wilkinson model
The total  integral  cross   section   for   nitrogen
photodisintegration  is  equal  to  330  mb*MeV with
error 20 mb*MeV in the energy region from  0  to  90
Data  were  compiled  at SCJAD of Saratov
